hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|js|json|svelte)$'; then bunx biome check --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.svelte$'; then svelte-check --threshold error --output human-verbose 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; exit 0

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'src/.*\.ts$' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.test\.ts$'; then TEST=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | sed 's/\.ts$/.test.ts/'); [ -f "$TEST" ] && bun test "$TEST" 2>&1 | tail -3; fi; exit 0
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */bun.lock|bun.lock) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly. Use bun install instead.' && exit 1;; esac; exit 0
